metadata.first_question_preview: Within an evolutionary algorithm, the termination condition may include the following elements: a) control of the number of iterations (maximum admitted number of generated populations), b) availabili
metadata.assignment_note: Inferred from segment count/content because translated all-in-one TXT contains no filename headers.

questions.question: Within an evolutionary algorithm, the termination condition may include the following elements: a) control of the number of iterations (maximum admitted number of generated populations), b) availability of memory space, c) reaching the optimal value of the objective function, d) checking a condition related to genetic diversity, e) the population size decreasing below an admitted limit, f) the chromosome length increasing.
In genetic algorithms, the parent selection operation

answers.a: Is only an implementation exercise, not necessary
answers.c: Is used depending on the chromosomal representation
answers.e: Is generally used in a non-deterministic manner

questions.question: In a genetic algorithm that maximizes a function (fitness): 1. Selection of the next generation is mandatorily age-based; 2. Only constrained problems are solved; 3. Parent selection is performed iteratively; 4. Mutation is performed with a small probability; 5. The use of FPS selection is not recommended; 6. The multiset of children is without duplicates; 7. Survivor selection is determined by quality and/or the age factor; 8. Recombination is performed rarely; 9. Determining a global maximum point is intended; 10. The chromosomal structure differs if the function is translated.

answers.a: Selection of the next generation is mandatorily age-based
answers.d: Mutation is performed with a small probability
answers.e: The use of FPS selection is not recommended
answers.f: The multiset of children is without duplicates
answers.g: Survivor selection is determined by quality and/or the age factor
answers.i: Determining a global maximum point is intended
answers.j: The chromosomal structure differs if the function is translated

questions.correct_raw: c, d, f, g, h, i

answers.d: Is an intermediate stage between deterministic and evolutionary algorithms
